notes: Diagnostics + Samsung guidance for the persistent 'audio cuts out on background' issue. Added a 'Diagnostic log' details section in the folder card that captures every audio-element lifecycle event (play/pause/playing/waiting/stalled/suspend/emptied/error), every visibility/focus/page-show-hide/freeze/resume event, and the audio's current time + paused state at each event. Persisted to localStorage so the log survives page kill. Also added a 'Samsung phones — required settings' help section pointing at One UI's Sleeping apps / Background usage limits / Adaptive battery / Auto-optimization toggles that override Chrome's Unrestricted setting.
